description: Optional remote access bootstrap policy for authorized administrators. Public builds never enable remote access silently.

winrm.notes: WinRM is opt-in. Basic authentication and unencrypted transport are blocked unless the operator runs an explicit lab command.

openssh.notes: OpenSSH Server is opt-in and scoped by firewall. The script does not create user credentials or keys.

qemu_guest_agent.notes: QEMU Guest Agent is for lab/VM environments only. It is not bundled in the public installer.
